name: ATLANTIC AMERICAN CORP
summary: Atlantic American Corporation is a Georgia-based insurance holding company incorporated in 1968. It operates through two primary subsidiaries: American Southern Insurance Company (property and casualty), offering commercial automobile, general liability, and surety bond coverage in 32 states and D.C.; and Bankers Fidelity (life and health), offering Medicare supplement, life insurance, and accident and health products across 46 states through approximately 6,243 licensed independent agents.
